{{CargoRelic
|name=The Book of Balance
|class_id=21295
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This book, written by Hayyan, is considered a foundational theoretical work on Islamic alchemy. The author believes that everything in the universe, including the four elements, celestial bodies, plants, animals, and humans, is generated through a process of emanation, with an inherent harmonious unity among them. He explores how to seekThis inner harmony and grasp the principles of balance between the material and spiritual worlds. The book includes an in-depth discussion of the basic principles, practical methods, and philosophical ideas of alchemy.
|fame=41
|art=50
|fth=74
|civ=30
|tech=48
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
